text.message: I've got no devs and a p
Can't take my last card like I'm on 9
The 4 is kind of my only block?
It wasn't that bad, just whining
Although we share the 8 wheat so maybe 6 wheat is a good block
Feels bad to solo at 4 points though
You can let black get a wood
Red sure looks to be on 9
Maybe I'm on 9 but not likely
If I knew black would trade it was block red
